notes: Zero Convex / app-state coupling — pure UI module.

Depends on `@/shared/ui/{popover,input,tabs,scroll-area,button}` (shadcn-Radix primitives) and `@/shared/lib/utils:cn`. Downstream consumers can swap these by changing 5 import paths; behaviour is unchanged.

Style preference + recents persistence uses two localStorage keys: `nosion:iconStyle`, `nosion:iconRecents`. Rename via search/replace in `lib/style-pref.ts` + `lib/recents.ts` to match host-app namespace, or accept the defaults.
Twemoji rendering uses the jsDelivr CDN mirror of jdecked/twemoji@15.1.0 — no npm dep, no build-time asset. Asset licence: CC-BY 4.0.
Curated 255-lucide-icon map in `lib/lucide-icons.ts` replaces `import * as Lucide` — full tree-shake, ~25KB gz vs ~150KB+ for the full set.
Single `useSyncExternalStore` subscription per app for iconStyle (was N per cell — 800 in a typical picker open). Same for recents.
Grid cells use `content-visibility: auto` + `contain-intrinsic-size: 0 320px` so the browser skips paint for offscreen rows. Free virtualization, no virtual scroller dep.
Search filter runs inside React 19 `startTransition` and a precomputed lowercase haystack map — keystroke stays responsive.
Popover defers mounting the picker body until first open.
